data.name: CF-Bot-Scraper — Low-BotScore Automated Scraping against shop.soledrop.co
data.description: Detects automated / scraper traffic against SoleDrop web properties (class_uid 4002, 'HTTP Requests') using Cloudflare's ML BotScore. Cloudflare emits BotScore as a 1–99 string where LOWER = more bot-like; a score <= 29 marks traffic Cloudflare's model considers likely automated. Casts unmapped.BotScore with number(), scopes to the lab surface (hostname contains 'soledrop.co', which covers shop.soledrop.co and any per-user *.lab.soledrop.co subdomain), groups by src_ip and fires when a single source produces >= 20 likely-bot requests in the window. Surfaces min/avg BotScore, distinct_paths (breadth of crawl) and a sample User-Agent as context. Low false-positive because a human browser does not emit 20+ requests scored <= 29 from one IP; validated hits carried unambiguous automation UAs (Wrath-AIO, libwww-perl, PhantomJS, Go-http-client). NOTE: the JA4 TLS-fingerprint variant of this detection is dead — unmapped.JA4 / ClientRequestJA4 / JA4Signals / BotTags return 0 records in this tenant — so BotScore is the working signal. MITRE ATT&CK T1595 (Active Scanning), T1071 (Application Layer Protocol); MITRE ATLAS AML.T0002 (data reconnaissance via scraping). Covers OneFlare scenario 'bot'.

scheduledParams.query:
class_uid=4002 dataSource.name='Cloudflare'
| let src_ip = src_endpoint.ip
| let bscore = number(unmapped.BotScore)
| filter http_request.url.hostname contains:anycase("soledrop.co") AND bscore <= 29
| group
    bot_requests   = count(),
    min_botscore   = min(bscore),
    avg_botscore   = avg(bscore),
    distinct_paths = estimate_distinct(http_request.url.path),
    sample_ua      = any(http_request.user_agent),
    host           = any(http_request.url.hostname),
    country        = any(src_endpoint.location.country),
    first_seen     = oldest(timestamp),
    last_seen      = newest(timestamp)
  by src_ip
| filter bot_requests >= 20
| let detection_time = simpledateformat(last_seen, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss z', 'America/Chicago')
| sort -bot_requests
| columns detection_time, src_ip, host, bot_requests, min_botscore, avg_botscore, distinct_paths, sample_ua, country, first_seen
| limit 100
